meta.title: Website Packages for B2B Companies | Eye On Idea
meta.description: Three website package tiers for SMB B2B companies — Foundation, Growth, and Brand Partner. Choose the right digital foundation for your business.

hero.title: Choose Your Digital Foundation
hero.subtitle: Eye On Idea works with SMB B2B companies at three tiers of engagement — from your first serious website to full ongoing brand management. Supporting services wrap around whichever tier fits your business.

overview.title: How Supporting Services Fit In
overview.subtitle: Every project includes a website package at its core. These services complete the picture — available individually or as part of a scoped project.

services.label: Website Packages
services.heading: A website built around your business
services.body: Not a template adjusted to fit, but a website scoped to where your company is right now. Whether you need a solid first presence or a platform built to grow with you, we work out the right scope before anything gets built.
services.imageAlt: Custom website planning setup with structured wireframes, content architecture notes, and a refined screen prototype

services.label: Visual Identity
services.heading: Look credible from day one
services.body: Your logo, colours, and typography are often the first thing people judge you on. We design visual identities that hold up across your website, presentations, and print, so your brand looks intentional wherever it appears.
services.imageAlt: Brand studio arrangement with logo plates, typography specimens, colour swatches, and material samples

services.label: Additional Services
services.heading: Everything around your website
services.body: Domain registration, professional email, website copy, SEO reviews, and advisory sessions. These are the services that sit around your website and make the whole thing work properly, available individually or as part of a project.
services.imageAlt: Modular digital operations toolkit representing domain, email, content, and SEO services around a central website

services.label: Ongoing Support
services.heading: A website is not a one-time product
services.body: After launch, things change. Content needs updating, questions come up, and the site should keep improving. Our support plans give you a direct line and a set amount of time each month, so you are never left figuring things out alone.
services.imageAlt: Dark workspace with monitoring dashboards, maintenance notes, and iterative improvement markers representing ongoing website support

packages.title: Choose Your Foundation
packages.subtitle: Professional websites tailored to your business stage and needs

launch.name: Foundation
launch.tagline: Build it right from the start
launch.description: A professional website that gives your company a credible, trustworthy presence from day one.
launch.idealFor: Companies establishing their first serious digital presence or resetting a weak one.

growth.name: Growth
growth.description: A flexible website designed to support content, updates, and visibility as your business grows.
growth.idealFor: Companies that actively update content and want a website that evolves with the business.

platform.name: Brand Partner
platform.description: A strategic website and brand platform build, plus ongoing partnership — for companies that want Eye On Idea involved well beyond launch.
platform.idealFor: Companies that see their website as an active business asset and want a sustained partner for content, visibility, and digital improvement.
includes: Modular structure for multiple content needs or audiences
Long-term partnership for refinement and digital continuity

packages.pricingNote: All prices excl. VAT. Final pricing depends on scope and requirements.

comparison.title: What's Included
comparison.subtitle: A detailed breakdown of features across all website packages

features.name: Custom website design
features.tooltip: Professionally designed, unique to your brand

features.name: Mobile-responsive
features.tooltip: Optimized for all devices and screen sizes

features.name: Custom domain (1 year)
features.tooltip: One domain registration included for first year

features.name: Basic SEO setup
features.tooltip: Meta tags, sitemap, and search engine indexing

features.name: Content management system
features.tooltip: Sanity CMS for independent content editing

features.name: Editorial workflow
features.tooltip: Draft, review, and publish content efficiently

features.name: Multi-section content
features.tooltip: Complex content structures across multiple areas

features.name: Advanced CMS capabilities
features.tooltip: Custom content types and advanced editing features

features.name: Scalable foundation
features.tooltip: Built to grow with your business

addons.title: Extend Your Project
addons.subtitle: Additional services you can add to any project, or order separately.

content.title: Content & Language
content.description: Help with writing, editing, and preparing your website content in multiple languages.

domain.title: Domain
domain.description: All packages include one domain with a 1-year licence. These add-ons cover extras, renewals, and transfers.
domain.note: Domain pricing varies by extension and registrar.

email.title: Email
email.description: Professional email addresses on your own domain. Hosted on EU infrastructure.

seoConsulting.title: SEO and Consulting
seoConsulting.description: One-time reviews and advisory sessions to improve visibility, performance, and technical quality.

identity.title: Brand Your Digital Presence
identity.description: A coherent visual foundation that gives your company a recognizable and professional appearance. Focused on web-relevant branding with options to extend into print.

carousel.eoiLight: Eye On Idea brand identity on light background
carousel.eoiDark: Eye On Idea brand identity on dark background
carousel.herqulez: Herqulez logo package showcasing brand variations

cms.title: Manage Content Independently
cms.description: Eye On Idea delivers custom CMS solutions using Sanity, enabling clients to manage content independently without technical complexity.

features.title: Structured Editing
features.description: Scalable content models adapted to your business needs

features.title: Editor-Friendly
features.description: Clean interfaces designed for non-technical users

features.title: Content Separation
features.description: Clear separation between content and design

features.title: Flexible Integration
features.description: Standalone service or included in website projects

support.title: Ongoing Partnership
support.subtitle: A website is not a one-time product. It's a living part of your business.

essential.name: Essential
essential.description: Light ongoing support for companies that want peace of mind and occasional help.
essential.bestFor: Smaller websites with low update frequency

growth.name: Growth
growth.description: Ongoing collaboration for companies that actively update and evolve their website.

partner.name: Partner
partner.description: A close working relationship where Eye On Idea acts as your long-term digital partner.

howWeWork.title: A Clear, Transparent Process
howWeWork.subtitle: From first contact to launch and beyond, every project follows the same professional workflow.

steps.title: Discover
steps.description: We meet to understand your goals, audience, and existing assets.

steps.title: Propose
steps.description: You receive a detailed proposal with scope, timeline, and transparent pricing.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: We develop your project with optional check-ins and a pre-launch preview.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: Your site goes live with 2 weeks of post-launch support included.

cta.title: Let's find the right tier for your business
cta.description: Every project starts with a conversation about where you are and what you actually need. No predefined scope — just an honest discussion.

beforeAfter.title: What Proper Web Development Looks Like
beforeAfter.subtitle: The difference between a template site and a professionally built digital presence, measured in the metrics that matter.
beforeAfter.sliderLabel: Drag to compare before and after metrics
